The '''Director of Galactic Alliance Intelligence''' ('''DGAI''') was head of the [[Galactic Alliance Intelligence Service]]. After the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], the Director of Intelligence also served as the [[Head of Galactic Alliance Security]].

==Directors of Galactic Alliance Intelligence==
*[[Dif Scaur]] {{C|[[28 ABY/Legends|28]]–[[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]]}}<ref name="The Unifying Force">''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''</ref>
*[[Belindi Kalenda]] {{C|29–[[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]}}<ref name="The Unifying Force" /><ref name="CSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>
*[[Heol Girdun]] {{C|40–[[41 ABY]]}} {{C|As part of the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]]}}<ref name="CSWE" />
*Belindi Kalenda {{C|41 ABY}}<ref name="X-Wing: Mercy Kill">''[[X-Wing: Mercy Kill]]''</ref>
*[[Borath Maddeus]] {{C|41–[[44 ABY]]}}<ref name="X-Wing: Mercy Kill" />
*[[Garik Loran]] {{C|44 ABY—}}<ref name="X-Wing: Mercy Kill" />
